zh: 当我到达时，电影已经开始了。
en: When I arrived, the movie had already started.

zh: 她吃完饭后才去散步。
en: She went for a walk after she had eaten.

zh: 当他回家时，孩子们已经睡着了。
en: When he got home, the children had already fallen asleep.

zh: 我发现我已经忘记了她的名字。
en: I found that I had forgotten her name.

zh: 当我们到达车站时，火车已经离开了。
en: When we reached the station, the train had already left.

zh: 她告诉我她以前从未见过大海。
en: She told me she had never seen the sea before.

zh: 他说他已经完成了作业。
en: He said he had already finished his homework.

zh: 当医生来时，病人已经去世了。
en: When the doctor came, the patient had already died.

zh: 我意识到我已经犯了一个错误。
en: I realized that I had made a mistake.

zh: 她不知道他已经离开了城市。
en: She did not know that he had left the city.

zh: 他们在我们到达之前已经吃完了。
en: They had already eaten before we arrived.

zh: 在她开始工作之前，她已经学习了三年英语。
en: She had studied English for three years before she started working.

zh: 在比赛结束之前，他已经跑了十公里。
en: He had run ten kilometers before the race ended.

zh: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。
en: I had never seen such a beautiful sunset.

zh: 在她出发之前，她已经打包好了行李。
en: She had packed her bags before she set off.

zh: 在他们结婚之前，他们已经相识了五年。
en: They had known each other for five years before they got married.

zh: 当警察到达时，小偷已经逃跑了。
en: When the police arrived, the thief had already escaped.

zh: 她在去医院之前已经吃了药。
en: She had taken the medicine before going to the hospital.

zh: 在他们开始会议之前，所有人都已经到了。
en: Everyone had arrived before they started the meeting.

zh: 当我打电话给他时，他已经知道了这个消息。
en: When I called him, he had already heard the news.

zh: 她在离开之前已经关掉了所有的灯。
en: She had turned off all the lights before she left.

zh: 在他们到达之前，我已经准备好了晚餐。
en: I had prepared dinner before they arrived.

zh: 当她意识到时，已经太晚了。
en: When she realized it, it had already been too late.

zh: 他在申请这份工作之前已经积累了丰富的经验。
en: He had gained a lot of experience before applying for the job.

zh: 在电影结束之前，她已经哭了好几次。
en: She had cried several times before the movie ended.

zh: 当他们找到他时，他已经在山里迷路了两天。
en: When they found him, he had been lost in the mountains for two days.

zh: 她说她以前从未尝试过冲浪。
en: She said she had never tried surfing before.

zh: 在他们修路之前，这里已经发生了很多事故。
en: Many accidents had happened here before they repaired the road.

zh: 当我找到钥匙时，我已经找了一个小时了。
en: When I found the key, I had been looking for it for an hour.

zh: 在她出版小说之前，她已经写了十年了。
en: She had been writing for ten years before she published her novel.
